notes: Physical contacts observed. max_contact_force is null because force extraction is disabled/unvalidated. insertion_success remains null until a validated success rule is implemented. insertion_success_estimate is a heuristic based on insertion_hold, completed trial status, and absence of explicit failure. contact_probe_validation validates Gazebo contact instrumentation only; task_completed is not required. max_contact_force is null unless validated force extraction is enabled. insertion_success is null because no validated contact-based success rule is implemented.
